steps.title: Identify what the sentence actually does
steps.content: The underlined sentence directly describes the Hibulb Cultural Center—what it displays, what population it serves, and how it approaches exhibit design. It's a factual statement about the institution itself.

steps.title: Determine which choice correctly names the function
steps.content: Choice D is correct because the sentence provides a basic description of a particular tribal cultural center—it explains what the Hibulb center does and how it operates. Choices A and B mistake the function as suggestion or encouragement, while C references comparisons that appear later in the passage. That matches choice D — D is correct.
